name: forum_topics
title: Forum Topics
description: Discussion threads within a forum category. A faithful port of a private predecessor-system's forum topic model, not part of this repo: a views counter, moderation flags (is_pinned/is_locked/is_solved), and AI-summary fields carried but not generated -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.

fields.name: project_id
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Optional project link carried from the source model. A plain text field, not a relation -- app-forum has no dependency on app-projects.

fields.name: views
fields.label: Views
fields.help: View counter. Incrementing it is a UI concern (a page-load side effect); this package carries the field but does not increment it -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.

fields.name: ai_summary
fields.label: AI Summary
fields.help: Carried from the source model, where it was written by a scheduled job. No generation is built here -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.

fields.name: is_ai_summarized
fields.label: AI Summarized
fields.help: Companion flag to ai_summary; also carried, not generated.
